race.comment: SPEAK THE TRUTH (2) was good from this barrier when fourth Leap To Fame in a Miracle of Mile qualifier last week. Had strong form in Brisbane prior, putting three wins together before heading south. Three-time winner at this circuit and distance along with a Miracle Mile placing and he draws to enjoy the favours. RAKERO ROCKET NZ (4) has placed in Miracle Mile qualifiers in his last two outings, beaten 1.5m in the Newcastle Mile and just over 2m here last week. Scored back-to-back wins at this circuit and distance prior, one at Listed level and the other in very slick time. That form would go close to winning this. HI MANAMEISJEFF NZ (7) led and faded to midfield last week but had won 10 of his other 13 attempts at this circuit and distance so deserves another chance. WAR DAN BUDDY (6) drew wider last week and was finding the line well before he was held up late. Another building a handy mile record. Tough draw for Chariots of Fire runner-up FINAL DEADLINE NZ (12) but the form reads well.
